name: network-policy-audit
description: Automated NetworkPolicy review, optimization, and compliance for OpenShift/Kubernetes clusters
author: Shreyas Be <shbehera@redhat.com>

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Comprehensive NetworkPolicy security, performance, and compliance analysis

commands.name: test-connectivity
commands.description: Predict if traffic is allowed between pods/services based on NetworkPolicy evaluation

commands.name: visualize
commands.description: Generate network topology diagram showing allowed traffic flows

commands.name: optimize
commands.description: Suggest policy consolidation and ACL reduction optimizations

commands.name: detect-drift
commands.description: Compare NetworkPolicies against approved baseline template
